splits.description: Top-level wrapper with all wire declarations, pipeline registers, and submodule instantiations
Input decoding, special value detection (NaN, infinity, zero), sign and exponent computation
Exponent difference calculation, mantissa alignment shifting
Sign-magnitude addition, result sign processing, leading-zero counting (LZC)
Output selection (normal, subnormal, infinity, NaN) and final output registers

warnings: Existing split files in rtl/rtl_splitter/ will be preserved. New split will be placed in rtl/rtl_splitter_new/
Multiplier module mult_booth4 already exists as separate file and will be reused
Pipeline registers will be kept in the top-level module to maintain timing structure
Some wire declarations may need to be moved to appropriate submodules
